allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false }; "stopped orphan dev server" } else { "port 3200 free" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false }; "stopped" } else { "already free" })
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{n='CPU';e={$_.CPU}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
